description: Handoff self-audit gap: a worker updated state/current_state.json + durable ledger but left STATUS/NEXT_ACTION/COMPRESSED_CONTEXT on the prior cycle (OPP-004 vs OPP-005). Fix rules/self-audit.md (or handoff checklist) to explicitly verify ALL volatile pointer files agree with current_state.json before exit. Found+filed during ADR-016 stabilization cycle.
